name: geobbox

metadata.name: geobbox
metadata.summary: A Python library to manipulate georeferenced bounding boxes.

documentation:
![Code style: black](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-000000.svg) ![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.org/projects/geobbox/badge/?version=latest)
# Geobbox A simple Python library to manipulate georeferenced bounding boxes. Read the [docs](https://geobbox.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) for more details.

modules.name: geobbox
documentation:
geobbox
=======

A python library for georeferenced bounding boxes.

modules.name: geobbox.utm
documentation: Base class to work with UTM zones.

classes.name: geobbox.utm.UTM

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.crs
documentation: The CRS associated to the UTM zone.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.hemisphere
documentation:
The hemisphere of the UTM region.

Returns
-------

str
    "N" for northern hemisphere and "S" for southern.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.left
documentation: Computes the UTM region left of the current region.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.right
documentation: Computes the UTM region right of the current region.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.from_latlon
documentation:
Computes the UTM zone encapsulating the point at the given coordinate.

Parameters
----------

lat : float
    Point latitude, between 80°S and 84°N (i.e. -80 <= lat <= 84).

lon : float
    Point longitude, between 180°W and 180°E (i.e. -180 <= lon <= 180).

Returns
-------

Self

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.utm_hemisphere_from_crs
documentation:
Computes the UTM hemisphere defined by the given `crs`.

Parameters
----------

crs : CRS
    The Coordinate Reference System, expected to be EPSG:326** or EPSG:327**.

Returns
-------

str
    The hemisphere of the given UTM CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.utm_zone_from_crs
documentation:
Computes the UTM zone defined by the given `crs`.

Parameters
----------

crs : CRS
    The Coordinate Reference System, expected to be EPSG:326** or EPSG:327**.

Returns
-------

int
    The zone number of the given CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.utm.UTM.is_utm_crs
documentation: Whether the given `crs` is a UTM local CRS.

Class to represent a UTM zone.

Attributes
----------

zone : int
    The zone number, between 1 and 60.

letter : str
    The zone letter.

See also
--------

`Universal Transverse Mercator
<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universal_Transverse_Mercator_coordinate_system>`_

modules.name: geobbox.geobbox
documentation: Utilities for working with different system of coordinates.

classes.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.__contains__
documentation:
Whether a point is contained in the bounding box.

Expects a point in northing/easting coordinate, in a CRS consistent with the bounding box.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.__and__
documentation:
Intersection of bounding boxes. Emits a warning if the bboxes are not in the same CRS.

Returns
-------

bbox : GeoBoundingBox
    The intersection of the bboxes expressed in the first one's CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.__iter__
documentation:
Iter over a GeoBoundingBox as if a (left, bottom, right, top) tuple

# Yields

left : float
bottom : float
right : float
top : float

:::{versionadded} 0.0.2
:::

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.ul
documentation: Upper-left corner of a bounding box, in northing/easting format.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.ur
documentation: Upper-right corner of a bounding box, in northing/easting format.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.ll
documentation: Lower-left corner of a bounding box, in northing/easting format.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.lr
documentation: Lower-right corner of a bounding box, in northing/easting format.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.center
documentation:
Compute the center coordinate of a bounding box, in northing/easting format.

Returns
-------

center: Coordinate
    The center of the bbox expressed in the same CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.area
documentation: Simple estimation of the area of the bounding box, expressed in the units of its CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.hypotenuse
documentation: Length of the bounding box hypotenuse.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.is_empty
documentation: Check if a bounding box has an empty interior.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.is_not_empty
documentation: Check if a bounding box has a non empty interior.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.with_
documentation: Returns a modification of the bounding box with specified changes.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.iou
documentation:
Computes the IoU (Intersection over Union) of two bounding boxes.

Parameters
----------

other : GeoBoundingBox
    An other bounding box, in the same CRS.

Returns
-------

float
    The IoU, a value between 0 and 1.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.intersects
documentation:
Check if a bounding box has non-empty intersection with another.

Parameters
----------
other : GeoBoundingBox
    An other bounding box, in the same CRS.

Returns
-------

bool
    True if the two bounding boxes have non empty intersection.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.is_contained
documentation:
Check if a bounding box is fully contained in another.

Parameters
----------

other : GeoBoundingBox
    An other bounding box, in the same CRS.

Returns
-------

bool
    True if the first bounding box is fully contained in the other.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.buffer
documentation:
Returns a bounding box increased by a given buffer in all directions.

Parameters
----------

buff : float

Returns
-------

GeoBoundingBox
    The buffered bounding box.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.unbuffer
documentation:
Returns a bounding box decreased by a given buffer in all directions, that is,
the same bounding box with its outer perimeter of given width removed.

Parameters
----------

buff : float

Returns
-------

GeoBoundingBox
    The unbuffered bounding box.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.to_ee_geometry
documentation:
Translate a bounding box as a ee.Geometry polygon.

Returns
-------

ee.Geometry
    The polygon representing the bbox in Google Earth Engine, in the same CRS.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.to_shapely_polygon
documentation:
Translate a bounding box as a ee.Geometry polygon.

Parameters
----------
in_native_crs : bool
    Whether to use the bbox CRS (True) or WGS84 coordinates (False). Defaults to False.

Returns
-------

shapely.Polygon
    The shapely polygon representing the bbox coordinates in its CRS or WGS84 (depending on
    `in_native_crs`).

Warning
-------

Georeferencement information is lost. The shapely polygon is just a mathematical object.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.to_latlon
documentation:
Convert a bounding box to a tuple of the form (lat_min, lon_min), (lat_max, lon_max),
as expected by folium.

Returns
-------
(lat_min, lon_min), (lat_max, lon_max) : Coordinate, Coordinate
    Coordinates of the bottom left and top right box corners, in that order.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.transform
documentation:
Transform a bounding box to `dst_crs`.

If mapping to the new CRS generates distortions, the smallest box encapsulating the corners
of the distorted box is returned. This is in general the smallest encapsulating box of the
distorted box.

Parameters
----------
dst : CRS
    Target CRS.

Returns
-------

bbox: GeoBoundingBox
    Bounding box in `dst_crs`.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.shape
documentation:
Compute the shape that would have an image at resolution `scale` fitting the bbox.

Parameters
----------
scale : int
    A pixel side-length, in meter.

Returns
-------

height, width: int

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.from_latlon
documentation:
Convert a bounding box of the form (lat_min, lon_min), (lat_max, lon_max),
as expected by folium, to a GeoBoundingBox.

Parameters
----------
cmin : Coordinate
    Bottom left corner coordinates.
cmax : Coordinate
    Top right corner coordinates.
crs : CRS (optional)
    The CRS in which the coordinates are expressed. Default is WGS84.

Returns
-------
GeoBoundingBox

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.ee_image_bbox
documentation:
Compute the bounding box of a GEE image in WGS84 CRS.

Parameters
----------
image : ee.Image
    A GEE image.

Returns
-------
GeoBoundingBox

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.from_rio
documentation:
Get a bounding box from a `rasterio` bounding box.

Parameters
----------

bbox : GeoBoundingBox
    A rasterio bounding box object.

crs : CRS
    The CRS in which the bbox is expressed. Default is WGS84.

Returns
-------

GeoBoundingBox

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.from_geofile
documentation:
Get a bounding box from a `rasterio`-compatible Geo file.

Parameters
----------
path : Path
    A path to a Geo file.

Returns
-------

GeoBoundingBox
    The bounding box of the geodata contained in the file.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.from_utm
documentation:
Get the bounding box of a UTM zone in WGS84.

Parameters
----------
utm : UTM
    The UTM zone.

Returns
-------

GeoBoundingBox
    The bounding box expressed in WGS84.

methods.name: geobbox.geobbox.GeoBoundingBox.to_utms
documentation:
Computes the UTM zones that the bounding box intersects.

Yields
------

UTM

A georeferenced bounding box.

This is a Coordinate Reference System (crs) and the bounding box's left, bottom, right and top
borders, expressed in that CRS.

Attributes
----------

left, bottom, right, top : float
    The borders of the bounding box.

crs : CRS
    The CRS of the GeoBoundingBox. Defaults to WGS84.
